ogTitle: Pinks Beach vs Pinnaroo: Climate Safety

heading: Pinks Beach vs Pinnaroo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinks Beach, South Australia and Pinnaroo, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinnaroo has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pinks Beach (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinks Beach or Pinnaroo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinks Beach has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Pinnaroo scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinks Beach scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Pinnaroo scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinks Beach or Pinnaroo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinnaroo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
